general.templates_description: Publish this project as a reusable private template or update an existing publication.
general.template_dialog_description: Creates an immutable version from the current project state after the template audit passes.
general.source_language_description: Defines the base locale used for source texts and translation workflows in this project.
general.source_language_hint: To change the source language, use the localization settings.
general.repair_description: If you renamed sheet shortcuts or variable names, flow nodes may reference old names. Use this to repair them.
general.delete_description: Once you delete a project, there is no going back. Please be certain.
general.repair_confirm_description: This will update node data across the entire project.

members.request_description: Invitation requests are reviewed by an admin before being sent.

localization.provider_description: Use your own DeepL API account for individual and batch translations.
localization.api_key_preserved: Leave this field empty to keep the encrypted key already stored.
localization.api_key_required: The key is encrypted before it is stored.
localization.tier_help: Choose the endpoint that matches your DeepL API subscription.
localization.connection_success: Connection successful. Usage information is up to date.
localization.usage_description: Current billing-period usage reported by DeepL.

snapshots.restoration_in_progress: A restoration is in progress. Please wait for it to complete.
snapshots.limit_reached: Snapshot limit reached for your plan.
snapshots.empty_description: Create a snapshot to save a point-in-time backup of your entire project.
snapshots.restore_confirm_description: This will overwrite all current project data with the state from this snapshot. A safety snapshot will be created before restoring.
snapshots.delete_confirm_description: This will permanently delete this snapshot. This action cannot be undone.

trash.title: Trash
trash.description: Deleted project items remain recoverable until their retention period expires.
trash.empty_description: Deleted sheets, flows, scenes, and screenplays will appear here.
trash.no_results_description: Adjust the search or type filter to find another item.
trash.delete_confirm_description: The {type} “{name}” will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
trash.empty_confirm_description: All deleted project items will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

version_control.daily_description: Creates a daily backup at 3:00 AM UTC when changes are detected.
version_control.auto_versioning_description: Automatically create version snapshots when editing entities.

usage_limits.current_plan_description: Limits combine project quotas and shared workspace quotas.
usage_limits.project_limits_description: These counters block new entities or versions inside this project.
usage_limits.workspace_limits_description: These quotas are shared by every project in the workspace.

descriptions.items: Sheets, flows, scenes, and flow nodes in this project.
descriptions.project_snapshots: Manual and automatic snapshots stored for this project.
descriptions.named_versions: Promoted entity versions that count against the project quota.
descriptions.storage: Total asset storage used by every project in this workspace.

export.title: Export
export.workspace_description: Create an engine-ready package with only the content your build needs.
export.choose_format_description: Each format adapts your project to a specific narrative runtime.

format_descriptions.ink: Narrative scripts for Inkle's open-source runtime.
format_descriptions.yarn: Dialogue files ready for Yarn Spinner projects.
format_descriptions.unity: Structured conversation data for Unity Dialogue System.
format_descriptions.godot: Dialogic timelines ready to add to a Godot project.
format_descriptions.unreal: Portable dialogue tables for Unreal Engine.
format_descriptions.articy: XML data for articy:draft production pipelines.

export.content_description: Include the project areas this build should receive.
export.select_content_warning: Select at least one supported content type to create an export.
export.output_settings_description: Control how the generated package is assembled.
export.assets_description: Choose how linked images, audio, and other files travel with the export.

references.title: References
references.description: Keep URLs in the output for the smallest package.

embedded.title: Embedded
embedded.description: Store files as Base64 inside the generated data.

bundled.title: Bundled
bundled.description: Add original files in a separate assets folder.

export.validate_before_description: Stop the download when blocking project issues are found.
export.pretty_print_description: Indent generated JSON so it is easier to inspect and version.
export.download_note: Your project is not modified. Exporting creates a new local file.

validation_descriptions.passed: The selected content passed every preflight check.
validation_descriptions.warnings: Review {warnings} warnings before sharing this build.
validation_descriptions.errors: Fix {errors} errors and review {warnings} warnings before exporting.

export.no_issues: No issues found. Project is ready for export.
